2006June 30, 2006

🇫🇷 Toulouse, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Toulouse, France, June 30, 2006

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2006-06-toulouse-france

14 Resolutions

690Plenary
Change of title for ISO 22745
SC 4 resolves to change the title of ISO 22745 to: "Open technical dictionaries and their application to catalogues".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
689Plenary
Request liaison statement to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7 on Systems Engineering
SC 4 requests its WG 3/T8 to prepare a liaison statement to SC 7 drawing their attention to the scope of the current work on Systems Engineering with a view to avoiding duplicated or inconsistent e...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
688Plenary
Amends resolution 674 regarding cooperation with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31 on AIDC
SC 4 replaces the first paragraph of resolution 674 with the following: "SC 4 expresses its interest in taking responsibility for Industrial Data application standards for all automatic identificat...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
686Plenary
Reappointment of WG 2 Deputy Convener and module ballot requirement
SC 4 approves the nomination of Prof. Guy Pierra to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
685Plenary
Withdraw and revise NP Ballot on AP 241
SC 4 withdraws the existing NWI on AP 241 (SC 4 N 2038).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
684Plenary
Request first meeting of WG 13
SC 4 requests WG 13 to hold its first meeting no later than the next meeting of SC 4 (October 2006) in Hershey, PA, USA and asks the convener to give at this meeting a status report to SC 4 on its ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
683Plenary
Appoint Convener of WG 13 on Industrial Data Quality
SC 4 appoints Dr. Tim King as the Convener of ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 13 for a three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
682Plenary
Reappointment of SC 4 Chair
SC 4 endorses the nomination by the United States of Howard Mason for an additional three year term (January 2007-December 2009) as the Chair of ISO/TC 184 / SC 4 and instructs the Secretary to for...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
681Plenary

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
